# Enterprise Blueprint Template

## Goal
Create a governed, durable, multi-surface AI operating system.

## Scope
- multiple systems tied by shared contracts
- central control plane
- bounded orchestration
- role separation
- auditability
- policy and change control
- formal handoff and documentation

## Required docs
- all Production docs
- source-of-truth manifest
- system identity lock
- component registry
- universal scheduler hierarchy
- change ledger
- governance model
- access model
- disaster recovery plan

## Done means
- multiple operators can run the system safely
- new GPTs or engineers can pick it up from docs
- architecture can evolve without silent drift
- production behavior remains bounded and explainable
